Find the length of time, in hours and minutes, he works.

The mean mass of four men in a rowing team is 97.5\,kg.

The modal mass is 101\,kg.

The range of the masses is 8\,kg.

Find the mass of each of the four men.

**Without using a calculator**, work out $\displaystyle\frac{5}{7} - \frac{2}{3}$.

You must show all your working and give your answer as a fraction in its simplest form.

A spinner can land on the colours green, black or red.

The table shows the probabilities of the spinner landing on green or black.

\begin{tabular}{|c|c|c|c|}
\hline
Colour & Green & Black & Red \\
\hline
Probability & $\displaystyle\frac{2}{5}$ & $\displaystyle\frac{1}{4}$ & \\
\hline
\end{tabular}
(a) 
t Complete the table.

t Chang spins the spinner 120 times.

Find the expected number of times it lands on green.
texHtml:
A spinner can land on the colours green, black or red. The table shows the probabilities of the spinner landing on green or black.
ColourGreenBlackRed
Probability$\displaystyle\frac{2}{5}$$\displaystyle\frac{1}{4}$
(a) t Complete the table. t Chang spins the spinner 120 times. Find the expected number of times it lands on green.

tex: Find the lowest common multiple (LCM) of 36 and 60.

$A$ is the point $(-3, 5)$ and $B$ is the point $(5, 2)$.

Find the coordinates of the midpoint of the line $AB$.

{---} ,  )][]

The diagram shows a right-angled triangle.

(a) 
t Calculate the value of $h$.

t Find the perimeter of this triangle.

The diagram shows two sides of a regular polygon.

The interior angle of the polygon is $(7x + 44)°$ and the exterior angle is $(x + 8)°$.

Find the number of sides of this polygon.

Keita invests \$4000 at a rate of 2.6\% per year compound interest.

Work out the interest earned on the investment at the end of 3 years.

Convert $0.2\dot{4}$ to a fraction.

You must show all your working and give your answer in its simplest form.

A map has a scale of $1 : 200\,000$.

Find the area, in square kilometres, of a lake that has an area of 12.4\,cm$^2$ on the map.

The diagram shows the speed--time graph for part of the journey of a car.

The car starts from rest and accelerates at a uniform rate for 15 seconds before reaching a constant speed of 30\,m/s.

(a) 
t Calculate the acceleration for the first 15 seconds.

t After $T$ **minutes**, the total distance travelled is 45 **kilometres**.

Find the value of $T$.

A kite is drawn on a coordinate grid.

The diagonals of the kite intersect at the point $(-2, -5)$.

One diagonal has equation $y = 4x + 3$.

Find the equation of the other diagonal of the kite.

Give your answer in the form $y = mx + c$.

$y$ is proportional to the square of $(x - 7)$.

When $x = 12$, $y = 2$.

Find $y$ when $x = 17$.

Two bottles are mathematically similar.

The small bottle has a capacity of 324\,ml and a height of 12\,cm.

The large bottle has a capacity of 768\,ml.

Calculate the height of the large bottle.

$\text{f}(x) = 5x - 3$, \quad $x > 1$

(a) 
t Find $\text{gf}(x)$.

Give your answer in its simplest form.

t Find $\text{g}^{-1}(x)$.

t Find $\text{ff}^{-1}(x - 1)$.

Sketch the graph of $y = \sin x$ for $0° \leqslant x \leqslant 360°$.

t Solve $3 - 2\sin x = \displaystyle\frac{13}{4}$ for $0° \leqslant x \leqslant 360°$.

The diagram shows the positions of three ships $A$, $B$ and $C$.

$AC = 17.6$\,km, $BC = 12.8$\,km and angle $BAC = 25°$.

The bearing of $C$ from $B$ is $112°$ and angle $ABC$ is obtuse.

Calculate the bearing of $B$ from $A$.

(a) 
t Expand and simplify.
\[(2x - 1)(x + 4)(x - 3)\]

t Write as a single fraction in its simplest form.
\[\frac{4}{2x - 3} \div \frac{2x^2 + 14x}{2x^2 + 11x - 21}\]
